name: Tailam Tech Construction Holdings Limited
summary: Tailam Tech Construction Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells pre-stressed high-strength concrete piles and commercial concrete in the People's Republic of China. It also offers ceramsite concrete boards. The company sells its products primarily to property developers and construction companies in Jiangsu province. Its products are used in residential, commercial, bridges, railways, ports, public works, and large scale projects. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
